input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.4.1
            TITLE: the ams must measure the cell voltage of every cell

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.4.1: The AMS must measure the cell voltage of every cell
EV.7.4.1 The AMS must measure the cell voltage of every cell  
When single cells are directly connected in parallel, only one voltage measurement is needed

final_answer: The AMS must measure the cell voltage of every cell. When single cells are directly connected in parallel, only one voltage measurement is needed
